chapters.title: Chapter One — No Alterations or Passing Notes
chapters.notes: Covers major scale, triads, diatonic 7th arpeggios, Coltrane patterns, quartal harmony, and diatonic licks over II V I.

chapters.title: Chapter Two — Chromatic Enclosures
chapters.notes: Adding chromatic notes, two-note and four-note chromatic enclosures.

chapters.title: Chapter Three — Harmonic Minor on the V
chapters.notes: Example lines using harmonic minor concepts.

chapters.title: Chapter Four — Altered Scale
chapters.notes: Altered scale, diatonic arpeggios of altered dominant.

Chapter Six — Putting It All Together
